title: cordia cochinchinensis
intro: Cordia cochinchinensis, also known as the Southeast Asian Tree of Life, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordia cochinchinensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against cardiovascular disease, among others. Traditionally, Cordia cochinchinensis is prepared as a decoction or infusions, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
